task_completion.description: Verify that the agent logged into Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo main dashboard or Calendar app is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the 'Q2 Financial Review' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal or page displaying the details of the 'Q2 Financial Review' calendar event is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent added a reminder to the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event's 'Reminders' field is being edited or has a new entry added.

task_completion.description: Verify that the reminder is set to an Email reminder 30 minutes before.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reminder entry explicitly shows 'Email' and '30' and 'minutes' (or '30 Minutes').

task_completion.description: Verify that the event changes were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event details are shown in a saved/read-only state, with the 'Email: 30 minutes before' (or similar) reminder visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible with the Odoo interface at localhost:8069.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to modify the Odoo database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing database queries or scripts modifying the calendar event.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction happened within the genuine Odoo web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo UI elements (navigation bar, calendar views, event modals) are present and correctly rendered.
